review: We were so fortunate to have found Autumn Cunningham when we found out that we were moving to Washington. As our Realtor, she helped us find the right house in the right neighborhood for the right price. She was very understanding as we traveled from Arizona to look at several homes and cautioned us about making unreasonable offers when we fell too quickly for overpriced homes.In short, she was always on our side working to make our house purchase as simple and successful as possible. The best part about working with Autumn was that she was always more focused on answering our questions, giving us good advice, and finding homes that met our needs than she was on closing a deal. We would recommend her to anyone wishing to buy or sell property.

businessResponse.comment: It was the perfect house for you, Jon! And what a great investment its become.

review: I'll tell you upfront, Autumn is the best. The rest of this review is essentially a long winded expounding of that opinion. She's an awesome blend of personal and professional that brought me great results.When I moved to Whatcom County, all I knew was that it was it was hard to find a rental, and the rental I got was pricey. After a year here, I decided it was time to move into something more permanent, but didn't know what I was looking for. Lucky for me, I ran across Autumn. She looked at my family size, life style and listened to what was important to me and then started feeding me options. She also explained to me the nature of this market, the different neighborhoods of Bellingham and the communities throughout the county, and the pros and cons to each.But what really made her stand apart from other realtors was she told me when something wasn't right. She wasn't looking to put me in the first thing we could find, she wasn't trying to shove me out of my comfort zone when it came to price, and she always told it like it was. She was looking out for me from day one.When it came time for negotiation on price, she was a bulldog. She knew what was fare, and she knew what was reasonable, and she got me where we needed to be.When I came to Autumn, my main concern was resale. I wasn't sure how long I would be living in Whatcom County, and wanted a home I would be able to turn around if I had too. She said trust me, I've got you. And boy did she ever. It's a year later, my house has gone up nearly $60,000 in value and the house two doors down just went off the market in under 24 hours for $25k over list!And it was her every step of the way. So often you work with a realtors assistant through different parts of the process. Autumn did it all. I never had to worry about anything being lost in translation, because I was always speaking and working directly with her.I can't say enough to describe just how happy I am with the level of service I received from her. Incredible!

businessResponse.comment: A 'double threat' - I like that! Thanks for such a fantastic review, Shannon!

review: Autumn is great. Extensive knowledge not only of local real estate market, zoning, permitting, etc; with her mortgage background she becomes a 'double threat' to provide comprehensive services with your real estate transaction.
